name: Angus King
stanceSummary: King has moved from supporting humanitarian-access measures to openly criticizing severe hunger conditions in Gaza and urging major policy change, while still participating in broader Senate debates on Israel-related security support. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: King urged expanded humanitarian corridors and distribution capacity for aid entering Gaza.
King said growing nutrition and starvation conditions in Gaza were unacceptable and called for changes in policy direction.
